hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(env|lock)$' && { echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Do not edit .env or lock files directly"}}'; exit 0; }; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -q 'osmose-java/' && { echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Java engine files are read-only reference code"}}'; exit 0; }; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; cd /home/razinka/osmose/osmose-python && .venv/bin/ruff format --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null; .venv/bin/ruff check --fix --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$' || exit 0; cd /home/razinka/osmose/osmose-python && .venv/bin/pyright "$f" 2>&1 | tail -1 | grep -q '0 errors' || echo 'PYRIGHT: type errors detected'; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE 'osmose/engine/.*\.py$' || exit 0; cd /home/razinka/osmose/osmose-python && base=$(basename "$f" .py) && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -x -q -k "$base" 2>&1 | tail -5; exit 0
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE 'osmose/schema/.*\.py$' && echo 'REMINDER: Schema changed — verify tests cover new/modified fields'; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE 'ui/.*\.py$' || exit 0; grep -n 'sync_inputs()\|update_config()' "$f" | grep -v 'isolate' | grep -v 'def ' | head -5 | while read line; do echo "WARNING: Possible missing reactive.isolate() — $line"; done; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE 'ui/pages/.*\.py$' && grep -q 'import ui.charts' "$f" && echo 'ERROR: ui.charts must only be imported in app.py (shadows shiny.ui) — revert this change immediately'; exit 0
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE 'tests/test_.*\.py$' || exit 0; cd /home/razinka/osmose/osmose-python && .venv/bin/python -m pytest "$f" -x -q 2>&1 | tail -5; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE 'osmose/engine/processes/(movement|mortality|predation)\.py$' && grep -qE '@njit|@jit' "$f" && echo 'REMINDER: Numba-jitted function changed — first run will include recompilation overhead, do not compare timing until second run'; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE 'ui/state\.py$' && grep -q 'def sync_inputs' "$f" && ! grep -q 'in old_val' "$f" && echo 'ERROR: sync_inputs must preserve multi-value config entries (semicolon-separated arrays) — check for ; in old_val before overwriting'; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE 'ui/pages/grid_helpers\.py$' && grep -qE 'def load.*(csv|mask)' "$f" && ! grep -q 'flipud' "$f" && echo 'ERROR: OSMOSE CSVs are south-to-north — CSV/mask loaders must np.flipud() after reading'; exit 0
